title: Senior Software Engineer, Salesforce
description:
LinkedIn is the world's largest professional network, built to create economic opportunity for every member of the global workforce. Our products help people make powerful connections, discover exciting opportunities, build necessary skills, and gain valuable insights every day. We're also committed to providing transformational opportunities for our own employees by investing in their growth. We aspire to create a culture that's built on trust, care, inclusion, and fun – where everyone can succeed.
   

  





 Join us to transform the way the world works.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 As a Senior Salesforce Engineer, you will lead the design, development, and scaling of secure, high‑quality solutions across the Salesforce platform. You’ll translate complex business requirements into robust technical designs, prepare and review RFCs, and deliver end‑to‑end solutions using Apex, LWC, Agentforce, Salesforce Data Cloud, and AI‑driven capabilities. The role includes managing and optimizing the SFDC org, driving best practices, and collaborating closely with cross‑functional partners to build modern, intelligent customer and enterprise experiences.
   

  

  

  

 At LinkedIn, our approach to flexible work is centered on trust and optimized for culture, connection, clarity, and the evolving needs of our business. The work location of this role is hybrid, meaning it will be performed both from home and from a LinkedIn office on select days, as determined by the business needs of the team.
   

  

  

  

 Responsibilities
   

  




* Work closely with business stakeholders to understand the requirements, translate them into technical solutions.
* Design, develop, test, and deploy Salesforce applications using
 **Apex, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and declarative tools.**
* Build responsive, accessible user interfaces aligned with
 **Salesforce Lightning Design System (SLDS).**
* Develop backend logic, integrations, and APIs using
 **Apex, REST/SOAP services, and platform events.**
* Design and develop AI based solutions and agents using Einstein AI, Agentforce and any Gen\\-AI tools.
* Best Practices: Adhere to Salesforce best practices, maintain code documentation, and write / maintain test classes for all custom development,
* Take ownership of release cycles to implement and deploy new/updates to existing applications and code,
* Integrating and maintaining business applications to Salesforce, such as DocuSign, Apttus, CPQ, Conga, etc,
* Collaborating with IT / Developers for other systems in order to integrate across the business,
* Develop Proactive monitoring using Event Monitoring and features.
* Test and Deploy solutions using CI/CD pipelines.
* Implement and troubleshoot
 **Salesforce CPQ and Apttus solutions.**


**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications
   

  




* Experience with Salesforce platform, Salescloud, and at least 6\\+ years of Salesforce development experience,
* Experience in developing LWC, Aura Components, Apex Triggers, Classes, VF Pages.
* Experience in SFDC Configurations
* Experience with integration solutions such as Dell Boomi, HDFS or other 3rd Party systems
* Experience in Salesforce CPQ and/or Apttus
* Experience with VSCode, Salesforce Lightning Design System
* Experience in working on Cursor / Agentforce Vibe Coding
* Experience with, various IT application development methodologies (e.g., Agile, Waterfall and blended models), and software engineering concepts
* Experience in implementing async apex.
* Experience with Data Migration
* Experience on implementing Salesforce Mobile pages/apps
* Experience in Enstein AI features like Prediction Builder, Next Best Actions, GenAi
* Experience in configuring event monitoring reports and dashboards.
* Eager to learn new tech stacks and contribute in a fast pacing environment.
* Experience as an IC and mentoring team members.
* Experience of collaborating with business stakeholders and team members.



 Preferred Qualifications
   

  




* Salesforce certifications (e.g., Platform Developer I / II, Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Agentforce Specialist)
* 7\\+ Years of software development experience
* Exposure to Salesforce Data Cloud, Agentforce, or AI\\-driven features
* Experience with integration platforms (Boomi, ETL tools)
* Familiarity with Agile development methodologies



 Suggested Skills
   

  




* Lightning Web Components
* Apex
* Salesforce security model
* Salesforce Sales Cloud
* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Agentforce



 You will Benefit from our Culture:
   

  

 We strongly believe in the well\\-being of our employees and their families. That is why we offer generous health and wellness programs and time away for employees of all levels
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

**India Disability Policy**




 LinkedIn is an equal employment opportunity employer offering opportunities to all job seekers, including individuals with disabilities. For more information on our equal opportunity policy, please visit https://legal.linkedin.com/content/dam/legal/Policy\\_India\\_EqualOppPWD\\_9\\-12\\-2023\\.pdf

title: Staff Software Engineer
description:
**Secure Every Identity, from AI to Human**
 Identity is the key to unlocking the potential of AI. Okta secures AI by building the trusted, neutral infrastructure that enables organizations to safely embrace this new era. This work requires a relentless drive to solve complex challenges with real\\-world stakes. We are looking for builders and owners who operate with speed and urgency and execute with excellence.
   

  

 This is an opportunity to do career\\-defining work. We're all in on this mission. If you are too, let's talk.
 



 Okta is the leading independent provider of enterprise identity. The Okta Identity Cloud enables organizations to securely connect the right people to the right technologies at the right time. Over 7,950 organizations trust Okta to help protect the identities of their workforces and customers.
 


**Position Description** 

 We are looking for a
 **Staff Front\\-End Engineer** 
 to build the user experience for the
 **Okta Recovery Vault (ORV)** 
 . The ORV is a critical new enterprise\\-grade capability designed to protect against the accidental or malicious deletion of identity objects. This role is essential to our "Land big, grow fast" strategy, by providing customers with a reliable safety net for their data.
 



 You will be responsible for designing and implementing a highly intuitive
 **self\\-service recovery UI** 
 . This interface must empower admins to perform complex operations—such as bulk restorations of hundreds of users, managing configurable retention policies, and navigating detailed post\\-restore checklists—with confidence and ease.
 


**Job Duties and Responsibilities** 
* **UI Development:** 
 Lead the implementation of the Recovery Vault UI, ensuring a seamless experience for authorized admins via the Okta Admin Console.
* **Complex Workflows:** 
 Build interactive interfaces for granular and bulk recovery operations, including async job progress indicators and success notifications.
* **Data Visualization:** 
 Develop the "Captured" data summary view, using visual cues like status icons and tooltips to show admins exactly which credentials and relationships are recoverable at a glance.
* **Advanced Filtering:** 
 Create robust filtering and search components that allow admins to scope deletions by source (Admin UI, Automation, SCIM) and time\\-based presets (Last 24h, 3 days, 7 days).
* **User Guidance:** 
 Implement interactive post\\-restore checklists and summary modals to guide admins through manual follow\\-up actions like MFA re\\-enrollment and API token reissuance.
* **Collaboration:** 
 Partner closely with Lead Product Designers and Product Managers to define the "how" of the user journey, ensuring the UI reduces admin "panic" during critical deletion incidents.
* **Performance:** 
 Ensure the UI remains responsive and performant even when handling large datasets during bulk operations.


**Required Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities** 
* **Experience:** 
 5\\+ years of experience building sophisticated, enterprise\\-scale web applications.
* **Frontend Core:** 
 Expert\\-level knowledge of modern JavaScript/TypeScript and frameworks such as React.
* **API Integration:** 
 Strong experience consuming RESTful APIs to power dynamic administrative interfaces.
* **UX/UI Sensibility:** 
 A proven track record of translating complex technical requirements into clean, user\\-centric interfaces.
* **State Management:** 
 Experience managing complex application states, especially for asynchronous long\\-running jobs and progress tracking.
* **Testing:** 
 Commitment to high code quality through unit testing, integration testing, and automated UI testing.


**Nice to Haves** 
* Experience building
 **administrative dashboards** 
 or recovery\\-focused tools.
* Familiarity with
 **Identity and Access Management** 
 concepts (Users, Groups, MFA, and RBAC).
* Experience with
 **feature flag frameworks** 
 and gradual rollout strategies.
* Knowledge of
 **accessibility (A11y)** 
 standards for enterprise software.
* Experience with
 **observability platforms** 
 to monitor UI performance and error rates.


**Education and Training** 
* B.S. in Computer Science or a related field.

description:
**Arista Networks** 
 is an industry leader in data\\-driven, client\\-to\\-cloud networking for large data center, campus and routing environments. Arista is a well\\-established and profitable company with over $5 billion in revenue. Arista’s award\\-winning platforms, ranging in Ethernet speeds up to 800G bits per second, redefine scalability, agility, and resilience. Arista is a founding member of the Ultra Ethernet consortium. We have shipped over 20 million cloud networking ports worldwide with CloudVision and EOS, an advanced network operating system. Arista is committed to open standards, and its products are available worldwide directly and through partners.
 



 At Arista, we value the diversity of thought and perspectives each employee brings. We believe fostering an inclusive environment where individuals from various backgrounds and experiences feel welcome is essential for driving creativity and innovation.
 



 Our commitment to excellence has earned us several prestigious awards, such as the Great Place to Work Survey for Best Engineering Team and Best Company for Diversity, Compensation, and Work\\-Life Balance. At Arista, we take pride in our track record of success and strive to maintain the highest quality and performance standards in everything we do.
 







**Who You’ll Work With** 




 As a software engineer at Arista, you own your project end to end. You and your project team will work with product management and customers to define the requirements and design the architecture. You’ll build the backend, write automated tests, and get it deployed into production via our CD pipeline. As a senior member of the team you’ll also be expected to help mentor and grow new team members. This role demands a strong and broad software engineering background, and you won’t be limited to any single aspect of the product or development process.
 



 The candidate will be working with the WiFi team at Arista, developing cutting edge and next generation WiFi solutions in a fast\\-paced environment. The WiFi team is responsible for the end to end development of the Cloud managed WiFi product portfolio of Arista. This specific position is for the WiFi AccessPoint team.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 As a core member of the AccessPoint team, the candidate is expected to work closely with relevant teams to understand product requirements, design the solution, build the software and deliver it for final validation and customer deployment. The successful candidate will also keep track of new and emerging technologies and their impact on Arista products, come up with new and innovative ideas to improve and differentiate the product and help Arista become a leading player in the Campus space. The candidate will also work closely with sales and support teams to push new solutions, understand customer needs and pain points and help resolve escalations. The candidate is expected to have a strong background in software development and good understanding of systems and networking areas with the knowledge of the WiFi area as an added bonus.
 



 The candidate's role will not be limited to a single aspect of the product, it will be broad encompassing many different aspects including but not limited to developing new Access Points, designing and implementing new features, tracking new technologies and working closely with the sales and customer teams.
 



  





**Requirements:** 




 • Strong engineering and Computer Science fundamentals
 



 • Minimum 3\\-15 years of relevant experience
 



 • Well versed with programming in one of C/C\\+\\+ languages
 



 • Experience working in a Linux environment, developing applications or
 **Linux drivers** 




  





**Proven experience in Any of the below:** 




 1\\. Network device drivers, operating system internals, Kernels, compilers, SOC architecture
 



 2\\. User space development for connectivity related products (Wireless Lan access points/ controllers, networking equipment) in one or more of following areas:
 



 • HostAPD, Portal, RADIUS, AAA, Identity and role management, Radsec
 



 • Tunnels, Firewall, Iptables, Flow Classification, QoS, TLS, DTLS
 



  





**Preferred Skills:** 




 • Experience with Wi\\-Fi device drivers on Linux.
 



 • Hands\\-on experience in working with one or more WIFI chipset platforms
 



 • Good System Level understanding of the Wireless AP functionality
 



 • Experience in developing Wi\\-Fi features, system integration, evaluate various performance parameters

title: Junior AI Software Engineers / AI Engineer Interns
description:
Junior AI Software Engineers / AI Engineer Interns
 
**StartupCrafters \\| Hyderabad, India \\& Remote (India)** 
**Experience: 0\\-2 years \\| Internships Open** 



 About StartupCrafters
 
 StartupCrafters is a global deep\\-tech lab and venture studio — the Venture Studio \\& Venture Capital arm of RB DesignTech, based in Los Angeles, California. 25 years of innovation. 450\\+ clients across India, UK, Europe, and the US. 45 startups built across AI, Robotics, and Blockchain.
 



 We don't make pitch decks about the future — we build it and ship it.
 



 Build. Launch. Scale. That's not a tagline — that's every week here.
   




 Why This Isn't Your Typical Job
 
 If you've been looking for a role where you actually get to build with the latest AI.
 



  





 We're working on things that are genuinely at the frontier — local LLMs running on custom hardware, multi\\-agent orchestration, MCP servers, AI\\-powered tools and skills, generative media pipelines, IoT integrations, and electro\\-mechanical devices controlled by intelligent agents. And we obsess over design and UX — because the most powerful tech is useless if it doesn't feel effortless to use. The projects are exciting, the tech is cutting\\-edge, and you'll learn something new every single day.
 



  





 Here's what makes StartupCrafters' work environment different:
 


* **Flat culture, fast decisions.** 
 Good ideas get heard no matter who you are. If your approach is solid, you'll get the green light to run with it — quickly.
* **Room to experiment.** 
 Want to try a new model? An unconventional architecture? A different approach? We encourage it. Thoughtful experimentation is how we stay ahead.
* **Your voice matters.** 
 Interns work alongside the founders. Your perspective counts from day one — if your idea is stronger, we'll go with it.
* **Learn at 10x speed.** 
 You'll work across more technologies in 3 months here than most engineers touch in 3 years at a large company. AI, IoT, robotics, blockchain, VFX, product design, UX — it's all on the table.
* **Direct contribution, real impact.** 
 Everything you build goes into real products used by real people. No busy work, no throwaway tasks.
* **Growth and recognition.** 
 Great work gets noticed. We celebrate wins, invest in your growth, and make sure your contributions are visible.


 What You'll Actually Do
 * Build agentic workflows and multi\\-agent orchestration systems
* Develop custom LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and tool\\-use architectures
* Integrate and experiment with open\\-source models (Qwen, LLaMA, DeepSeek, Mistral, Gemma)
* Create AI\\-powered developer tools, automation systems, and MCP servers
* Work with video/image generation APIs and pipelines (Kling, Runway, Luma, Veo)
* Build across domains — AI, IoT, electro\\-mechanical devices, and advanced hardware integrations
* Collaborate on product design, UX flows, and user experience — engineers here don't just write code, they shape the product
* Move fast — prototypes in days, production\\-ready features in weeks


 Who You Are
 * You've built something real with AI — a project, a tool, a bot, an agent, anything that works. Show us.
* Comfortable with Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, or Rust. Bonus if you vibe\\-code in Cursor, Claude Code, or Windsurf.
* Familiar with the current AI stack: agentic frameworks, MCP servers, tools and skills, Ollama, HuggingFace, vector databases
* You understand how LLMs actually work — tokens, context windows, tool calling, structured output — not just API wrappers
* Self\\-taught is a superpower here. We care about what you've built, not which college you went to.
* You communicate clearly — you can explain what you're building to someone non\\-technical, and hold your own in an architecture discussion
* Resourceful problem\\-solver — you dig into docs, source code, and communities to find answers, and you ask smart questions when you need help


 Bonus Points
 * Active GitHub with AI/ML projects or open\\-source contributions
* Experience with MCP (Model Context Protocol), tool calling, skills, or building agent systems
* Built something in a hackathon, shipped a side project, or have a portfolio that punches well above your experience level
* Comfortable with local model deployment (Ollama, vLLM, llama.cpp)
* Active in AI communities — Discord servers, open\\-source repos, Twitter/X, technical blogs, YouTube channels
* Any experience with IoT, hardware, robotics, or embedded systems is a big plus


 What We're NOT Looking For
 * Engineers who wait to be told what to do instead of taking initiative
* People who only know one framework and aren't curious enough to explore others
* Anyone who thinks "AI experience" means completing an online certificate and updating their LinkedIn headline


 Details
 * **Location:** 
 Hyderabad, India (hybrid) or Remote (India only)
* **Type:** 
 Full\\-time or Internship (3\\-6 months, with a genuine path to full\\-time)
* **Compensation:** 
 Competitive for early\\-stage \\+ equity for full\\-time hires
* **Perks:** 
 Access to cutting\\-edge hardware, frontier AI tools, learning opportunities, and a team that's genuinely passionate about what we're building


 How to Apply
 
 DM me on LinkedIn with:
 


1. One recent AI project you've built (GitHub link, demo, video, or short write\\-up)
2. Your favourite AI tool or model right now, and what you're building with it
3. What excites you most about working at the intersection of AI and deep\\-tech



  





 Just show us what you've built and what gets you excited.
 



 Come build the future with us.
 



  





 HR@StartupCrafters

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and machine learning solutions. As one of the fastest\\-growing AI organizations globally, Turing focuses on developing innovative platforms and tools that accelerate AI research and deployment. With a commitment to excellence and a passion for pushing the boundaries of technological capabilities, Turing collaborates with top\\-tier industry partners and academic institutions to shape the future of AI\\-driven software development. The company's culture emphasizes innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning, making it an ideal environment for professionals eager to contribute to cutting\\-edge projects and impactful solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on building large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. The primary focus of this role is to leverage high\\-quality public GitHub repositories to create verifiable software engineering tasks that simulate real\\-world scenarios. This involves working closely with research teams to develop synthetic datasets based on repository histories, incorporating human\\-in\\-the\\-loop methodologies to enhance dataset accuracy and coverage. The role demands hands\\-on software engineering expertise, including automating development environments, triaging issues, and assessing test coverage and code quality. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in software development, a deep understanding of open\\-source projects, and experience leading technical initiatives.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum of 3\\+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* Proficiency in at least one programming language such as Ruby, with a solid understanding of software development best practices.
* Experience with version control systems, particularly Git, and containerization tools like Docker.
* Ability to understand, navigate, and modify complex codebases effectively.
* Hands\\-on experience setting up and configuring development environments, including automation and scripting.
* Familiarity with open\\-source projects and contribution or evaluation experience is advantageous.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with multidisciplinary teams.


**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub.
* Set up, configure, and automate development environments using Docker and other tools.
* Assess and improve unit test coverage and code quality metrics.
* Modify, run, and evaluate codebases locally to test LLM performance in bug\\-fixing and code understanding tasks.
* Collaborate with researchers to identify repositories and issues that present challenges for LLMs, contributing to dataset creation.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative team environment.
* Document processes, findings, and best practices to enhance project workflows.
* Participate in regular project meetings and provide technical insights to guide research directions.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers a range of benefits designed to support your professional growth and well\\-being. You will have the opportunity to work remotely from anywhere, providing flexibility to balance work and personal life. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization at the forefront of AI research, collaborating on impactful projects that influence the future of software development and AI integration. Turing also provides opportunities for continuous learning through exposure to cutting\\-edge technologies and methodologies. Additionally, you will be part of a diverse and inclusive community that values innovation, excellence, and growth.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We believe that a variety of perspectives and experiences enrich our team and drive innovation. We do not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, religion, or any other protected characteristic. All qualified applicants will receive equal consideration for employment and opportunities to grow within the company. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply and join us in shaping the future of AI technology.

title: System Software Engineer, GPU Development Tools
description:
Job Requisition ID
   

  

 JR2016165
   

  

 Job Category
   

  

 Engineering
   

  

 Time Type
   

  

 Full time
   

  

 NVIDIA has continuously reinvented itself. Our invention of the GPU sparked the growth of the PC gaming market, redefined modern computer graphics, and revolutionized parallel computing. Today, research in artificial intelligence is booming worldwide, which calls for highly scalable and massively parallel computation horsepower that NVIDIA GPUs excel.
   

  

 We are now looking for a GPU Development Tools System Software Engineer. A key part of NVIDIA's strength is our sophisticated development tools and simulation environments that enable our incredible pace of delivering new technology to the market. We are looking for forward\\-thinking, hard\\-working, and creative people to join a dynamic software development team with high production\\-quality standards. Our work includes designing and developing frameworks for creating GPU workloads that enable functional and perf verification of GPU. NVIDIA is continuously pushing the state of the art in chip development software and infrastructure to enable the next generation of chips.
   

  

 In this position, you will develop the core infrastructure needed to generate stimulus for modeling, analysis, and debugging of upcoming general\\-purpose graphics and computing chips. Our infrastructure is critical to enable GPU development and verification throughout the chip lifecycle and is used across many diverse groups of engineers including but not limited to chip architects, driver developers, and verification engineers.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* As a member of the team, you will play a critical role in all stages of GPU development
* Design and architect features in compute and graphics stimulus development framework similar to OpenGL and CUDA
* Coordinate with GPU architects to craft and implement infrastructure used for functional and performance verification for the upcoming architecture
* Design and develop GPU stimulus analysis tools such as debuggers \\& disassemblers
* Empower GPU architects to understand application performance today and model industry\\-leading performance for tomorrow
* Work closely with HW \\& SW teams to enable speed\\-of\\-light development of GPU software ecosystem
* In this role, you will dramatically improve the daily workflows of the world's top chip modelers and designers to help produce the world’s next greatest generation of GPUs


**What We Need To See**
* Bachelors or masters in computer science / computer engineering or equivalent experience
* 4\\+ years of overall experience with large portion of that working on C\\+\\+ based projects
* Strong C\\+\\+ programming capability required (experience with boost or C\\+\\+11/14 a plus)
* Knowledge of object\\-oriented design patterns
* Good understanding of system software and Operating Systems
* Strong expertise in design and development of complex massively parallel algorithms
* Experience with chip and/or system simulation a huge plus
* Strong scripting skills desired
* Graphics or CUDA knowledge a plus
* Experience with OpenGL, Vulkan, Direct3D, CUDA APIs a plus
* Excellent interpersonal skills


 NVIDIA is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly value diversity in our current and future employees, we do not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status or any other characteristic protected by law.

 Is DevOps more to you than just configuring AWS and VMs to run the quick unit tests of web services? This role is in the Platforms organization, responsible for creating reusable solutions for teams around the globe to then create the most sophisticated industrial barcode readers, machine vision and smart cameras in the world. We combine custom hardware, specialized lighting and optics, and world class vision algorithms to create embedded systems for reading barcodes. Using these systems, we can find and read high\\-density symbols on package labels or marked directly on a variety of industrial parts, including aircraft engines, electronics substrates, and pharmaceuticals test equipment. Our devices need to read hundreds of codes per minute, so the team needs to optimize both hardware and software to create best in class technology.
 



  





 We are offering a comprehensive package of both interesting and challenging work, fun, and reward:
 


* Work as part of one of the fastest growing and most successful companies in the industry with a double\\-digit growth target for the next decade. This growth translates into new challenges, and the opportunity to lead one of our growing teams.
* Join a warm, informal, personable and entrepreneurial culture in mind.

 Just some loose terms to show that we are buzzword\\-proof: multi\\-national development teams, heterogeneous multi\\-core system, real\\-time applications, industry 4\\.0\\. Sounds exciting, right?
 



  





**About you:**




 Our ideal candidate is a pragmatic software professional with a can\\-do attitude who shares the enthusiasm for learning and applying any new development that helps to keep our software platform state of the art. Here's a list of some of the things we pay attention to in our hiring process:
 


* Master’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

We operate the world’s most sophisticated processing networks capable of handling more than 65k secure transactions a second across 80M merchants, 15k Financial Institutions, and billions of everyday people. Its commitment to diversity and inclusion, sustainability, and community engagement underscores its dedication to creating a positive impact worldwide.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Software Engineer to join our dynamic Generative AI team at Qualcomm. This role offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the development and deployment of advanced AI solutions on Qualcomm chipsets. As a key member of the team, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and optimizing software stacks that enable on\\-device inference of large language models (LLMs) and vision models (LVMs). Your expertise will help harness Qualcomm’s heterogeneous computing capabilities to deliver high\\-performance, power\\-efficient AI solutions directly on devices, eliminating dependence on cloud connectivity. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in AI hardware acceleration, software development, and a passion for pushing the limits of edge\\-based AI technology. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams to innovate and implement solutions that meet and exceed performance benchmarks, shaping the future of AI at the edge.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field with a minimum of 4 years of relevant work experience; or Master's degree with 3\\+ years; or PhD with 2\\+ years in a similar domain.
* Proven experience in programming languages such as C, C\\+\\+, Java, or Python, with a strong understanding of software development best practices.
* Deep understanding of Generative AI models including LLMs, LVMs, and foundational building blocks like self\\-attention, cross\\-attention, and kv caching.
* Knowledge of floating\\-point and fixed\\-point representations, quantization techniques, and their application in AI hardware optimization.
* Experience in optimizing algorithms for AI accelerators such as CPUs, GPUs, and NPUs.
* Excellent analytical, debugging, and problem\\-solving skills.
* Strong communication skills to effectively collaborate across diverse teams and articulate complex technical concepts.


**Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will lead the development and commercialization of the Qualcomm AI Runtime (QAIRT) SDK on Qualcomm System on Chips (SoCs). Your primary focus will be on enhancing the performance and efficiency of large AI models, particularly in edge environments. You will deploy and optimize large C/C\\+\\+ software stacks, ensuring they leverage Qualcomm’s heterogeneous hardware capabilities to deliver blazing\\-fast inference speeds with minimal power consumption. Staying current with the latest advancements in Generative AI, including transformer architectures and model deployment techniques, will be essential. You will also collaborate with hardware teams to understand system\\-level constraints and tailor software solutions accordingly. Your work will directly impact the ability of developers to run sophisticated neural network models seamlessly on Snapdragon platforms, pushing the boundaries of what is possible in edge AI applications.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Qualcomm offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the health, well\\-being, and professional growth of its employees. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance plans, and wellness programs. Employees have access to ongoing training and development opportunities, fostering continuous learning and career advancement. Qualcomm promotes a flexible work environment and values work\\-life balance, providing options for remote work where applicable. Additionally, employees benefit from a collaborative and innovative culture that encourages creativity, diversity, and inclusion. The company also provides various employee engagement initiatives, recognition programs, and resources to support personal and professional success.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Qualcomm is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, disability, or any other legally protected status. We are dedicated to providing accessible hiring processes and workplace accommodations to support individuals with disabilities. If you require an accommodation during the application or interview process, please contact us via email or phone as provided on our careers page. Qualcomm values the unique perspectives and experiences of all employees and strives to create an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute to our shared success.

 Bechtel’s India offices support the execution of projects and services around the world. Working seamlessly with Bechtel’s global business units, project sites, customers, and suppliers, our teams have delivered more than 125 projects since 1994\\. With offices in Gurgaon, Vadodara, and Chennai there are exciting career opportunities for candidates who are passionate about delivering projects that make a lasting, meaningful difference for people and communities around the world.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Senior Software Engineer specializing in Data Engineering and Power BI Analytics to join our growing team. This role will focus on designing, developing, and optimizing scalable data solutions within the Azure cloud environment while enabling advanced analytics and business intelligence using Power BI.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will possess strong expertise in Azure Data Lake, Azure Data Factory, Databricks, and Power BI, with the ability to design end\\-to\\-end data pipelines and build robust analytical models and dashboards that drive business insights. This role will play a key part in delivering enterprise analytics solutions, data visualization frameworks, and self\\-service BI capabilities for business stakeholders.
   

  

**Major Responsibilities**
 Data Engineering \\& Data Platform
   

  

* Design, develop, and optimize scalable data processing pipelines and architectures within Azure Data Lake and Databricks, ensuring performance, scalability, and maintainability.
* Implement and manage complex ETL/ELT data pipelines integrating data from multiple enterprise sources such as databases, APIs, and external systems.
* Use Azure Data Factory for workflow orchestration, scheduling, and monitoring of enterprise data pipelines.
* Implement data quality validation frameworks to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency across the data platform.
* Optimize data storage, transformation, and query performance within Azure environments including Databricks, Azure SQL, and Synapse.


 Power BI Development \\& Analytics
   

  

* Design, develop, and maintain enterprise Power BI solutions, including semantic models, datasets, dashboards, and analytical reports.
* Build interactive and visually compelling dashboards that translate complex data into meaningful insights for business stakeholders.


 Develop Power BI data models, including star schemas, DAX measures, calculated columns, and optimized datasets.
